title: linum seljukorum subsp. seljukorum
intro: Linum seljukorum subsp. seljukorum, also known as Seljuk flax or Turkish flax, is a perennial plant belonging to the Linaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Linum seljukorum subsp. seljukorum include its potential in reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from anxiety and insomnia. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
